metadata.pricing_note: EAV (Estimated Auction Value) derived from county base values, property type, and auction discount. Confidence: HIGH = direct price signal from notice, MEDIUM = derived from county + type + size (+ RentCast rent when available), LOW = county average only. Not a formal appraisal.
